news.title:
Man Infraconstruction faces disapproval notice for Atmosphere Project in Mulund West.
The project, started in 2014, has 7200 sq. ft. of saleable carpet area.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction faces disapproval notice for Atmosphere Project in Mulund West.
The project, started in 2014, has 7200 sq. ft. of saleable carpet area.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd's associate got IOD for O2 Highstreet project.
Project in Mumbai, 7,200 sq.ft carpet area for sale; 30% equity stake.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd's associate got IOD for O2 Highstreet project.
Project in Mumbai, 7,200 sq.ft carpet area for sale; 30% equity stake.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction's Q3 FY25 net sales fell 36.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 153.3 cr.
Net profit declined 44.1% to Rs 46.97 cr; EPS dropped to Rs 1.16 from Rs 2.25.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction's Q3 FY25 net sales fell 36.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 153.3 cr.
Net profit declined 44.1% to Rs 46.97 cr; EPS dropped to Rs 1.16 from Rs 2.25.

news.title:
Promoter Parag K. Shah acquired 1,00,000 shares of Man Infraconstruction Ltd via open market on 24.02.2026.
Post-acquisition, promoter group holds 62.46% voting rights in Man Infraconstruction Ltd, unchanged share capital.
news.summary:
Promoter Parag K. Shah acquired 1,00,000 shares of Man Infraconstruction Ltd via open market on 24.02.2026.
Post-acquisition, promoter group holds 62.46% voting rights in Man Infraconstruction Ltd, unchanged share capital.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd received IOD for Virgo CHS redevelopment, Pali Hill.
Ultra-luxury project with sales over ₹500 crore. MICL holds 34% stake.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd received IOD for Virgo CHS redevelopment, Pali Hill.
Ultra-luxury project with sales over ₹500 crore. MICL holds 34% stake.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd receives disapproval notice for Pali Hill project.
The high-end residential project was expected to generate ₹500 crore; demolition to start before construction.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd receives disapproval notice for Pali Hill project.
The high-end residential project was expected to generate ₹500 crore; demolition to start before construction.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction launched Artek Park in BKC with Q3FY26 sales of ₹447 cr.
9MFY26 sales reached ₹1,362 cr; company sold 3.9 lakh sq.ft. and is net debt-free.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction launched Artek Park in BKC with Q3FY26 sales of ₹447 cr.
9MFY26 sales reached ₹1,362 cr; company sold 3.9 lakh sq.ft. and is net debt-free.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd reported 9M FY26 consolidated revenue of Rs 811,639.4 lakh.
Board approved Q3 results, discussing amalgamation and labor code impacts.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd reported 9M FY26 consolidated revenue of Rs 811,639.4 lakh.
Board approved Q3 results, discussing amalgamation and labor code impacts.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Results include consolidated and standalone figures, reviewed by auditors, with detailed revenue and profit disclosures.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Results include consolidated and standalone figures, reviewed by auditors, with detailed revenue and profit disclosures.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction reports Q3 EBITDA of 327M INR, down from 1.06B YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 21.37% in Q3, compared to 44% YoY.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction reports Q3 EBITDA of 327M INR, down from 1.06B YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 21.37% in Q3, compared to 44% YoY.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction's board meeting on Feb 11, 2025, to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited results.
Trading window remains closed till Feb 13, 2026, as per SEBI insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction's board meeting on Feb 11, 2025, to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited results.
Trading window remains closed till Feb 13, 2026, as per SEBI insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction's subsidiary MICL TIGERTAIL LLC reduces stake from 50% to 25% by Jan 2026.
Sale to ADMIRE 1755 TIGER LLC fetches $1.2M; subsidiary lacks significant income yet.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction's subsidiary MICL TIGERTAIL LLC reduces stake from 50% to 25% by Jan 2026.
Sale to ADMIRE 1755 TIGER LLC fetches $1.2M; subsidiary lacks significant income yet.

news.title:
Parag K. Shah, a promoter of Man Infraconstruction Ltd, acquired 63,000 shares in the open market on 12.12.2025.
Post-acquisition, his holdings increased to 11.94 crore shares, representing 29.6% of the total voting capital.
news.summary:
Parag K. Shah, a promoter of Man Infraconstruction Ltd, acquired 63,000 shares in the open market on 12.12.2025.
Post-acquisition, his holdings increased to 11.94 crore shares, representing 29.6% of the total voting capital.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction shares rose 4% as promoters increased stake to 62.3%, net profit jumped 27% despite 35% revenue drop.
Axis Direct set target price at ₹190, citing robust project pipeline, strong liquidity, and potential ₹6,600 Cr sales from launches.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction shares rose 4% as promoters increased stake to 62.3%, net profit jumped 27% despite 35% revenue drop.
Axis Direct set target price at ₹190, citing robust project pipeline, strong liquidity, and potential ₹6,600 Cr sales from launches.

news.title: Man Infraconstruction promoter Parag K. Shah bought 100,000 shares on Nov 24.
news.summary: Man Infraconstruction promoter Parag K. Shah bought 100,000 shares on Nov 24.

news.title:
Man Infra declared a ₹0.44/share dividend with ex-date Feb 12, 2025.
Despite negative recent returns, it posted 702% total return over 5 years.
news.summary:
Man Infra declared a ₹0.44/share dividend with ex-date Feb 12, 2025.
Despite negative recent returns, it posted 702% total return over 5 years.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction targets strong growth in real estate and EPC, launching large residential projects in Mumbai.
Company diversifies into ports, warehousing, infra, with record sales, improving realizations, and focus on debt reduction.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction targets strong growth in real estate and EPC, launching large residential projects in Mumbai.
Company diversifies into ports, warehousing, infra, with record sales, improving realizations, and focus on debt reduction.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction launched Artek Park, luxury project in Mumbai's BKC.
Q2FY26 sales doubled YoY to ₹424Cr; PAT grew 24% YoY; net debt-free.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction launched Artek Park, luxury project in Mumbai's BKC.
Q2FY26 sales doubled YoY to ₹424Cr; PAT grew 24% YoY; net debt-free.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction's Q2 net profit rises to ₹600M from ₹472M YoY.
Revenue declines to ₹1.5B in Q2 compared to ₹2.3B YoY.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction's Q2 net profit rises to ₹600M from ₹472M YoY.
Revenue declines to ₹1.5B in Q2 compared to ₹2.3B YoY.

news.title:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sept 30, 2025.
Declared Rs. 0.45/share interim dividend; record date set as Nov 18, payment on Dec 2, 2025.
news.summary:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sept 30, 2025.
Declared Rs. 0.45/share interim dividend; record date set as Nov 18, payment on Dec 2, 2025.
